blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Ensure that the waitlist prioritizes members over non-members.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of prioritizing members in the waitlist, but the provided evidence does not include any details about how members are prioritized over non-members. The evidence only confirms that customers can join a waitlist and receive offers, but it lacks specific information on the tiering mechanism that would ensure members are prioritized. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement of priority tiers.
gaps: No evidence of priority tiers for members in the waitlist.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify priority tier implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the waitlist prioritizes members over non-members.
